source.notes: Discovered via pitstop-check@0.1.1 static scan. Related: Feb 2026 fix by RomneyDa for embedded 429 detection in Gemini/VertexAI.

hazard.summary: Exponential backoff utility collapses WAIT and CAP into single retry path — no Retry-After consultation, all 429s treated as retryable
signals: Gemini 429 detection fixed upstream Feb 2026 but backoff layer unchanged

constraints: Retry-After header must be consulted before retrying on 429
WAIT (transient, respect Retry-After) and CAP (concurrency limit) must be distinguished
Retry loop must have max elapsed bound
knobs: retryAfterMs — read from response header before backoff calculation
maxElapsedMs — hard cap on total retry window
concurrencyCap — limit parallel retries under shared rate limit
verification: Run pitstop-check against core/util and extensions/cli/src/util — should return zero warnings
Under concurrent load, verify 429 response with Retry-After header causes all workers to pause for header duration before retry
Confirm CAP classification routes to concurrency reduction, not simple backoff
